title: Send message to redirect history agent

log.context: Send message to redirect history agent

There is no `SendMessage` tool available to directly message a specific agent by ID. The available tools are for Discord, browser, tasks, and remote triggers — none of them provide agent-to-agent messaging by agent ID.

Here is what I can tell you about the options:

1. **Task system** — If the agent `aae19fd7e0ae9c249` is working on a task, I can add a comment or update that task with the redirect instructions using `TaskGet`/`TaskUpdate`. This would require knowing the task ID they are working...(truncated)
